data.title: 国际服Arcie小编三周年祝贺视频
data.summary: Sensei, please check out CM Arcies'(?) congratulatory video message in celebration of the 3-Year Ann
data.body:
Sensei, please check out CM Arcies'(?) congratulatory video message in celebration of the 3-Year Anniversary! Thank you for being with us!❤
We hope for your continued support of CM Arcie's live streams!

➡️Celebration video: https://youtu.be/Xw0RsGx8EIM

#BlueArchive
